points.text: Summit Therapeutics — Ivonescimab — Non-small cell lung cancer — Phase 3 trial reduced risk of death by 34% vs standard chemotherapy plus PD-1 inhibitor, validating the PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody class.
Ona Therapeutics — Series B funding — Breast and colorectal cancer — Raised $86.6M to advance a pair of antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) into clinical development.

Lonza announced an enhanced preclinical development offering enabling monoclonal antibody programs to achieve IND readiness in as little as six months with toxicology-grade drug substance available in approximately two months.
Shattuck Labs reported completion of enrollment for the Phase 1 clinical trial of SL-325, a first-in-class DR3 blocking monoclonal antibody, with data expected in Q2 2026.
Shattuck Labs plans to initiate a Phase 2 clinical trial of SL-325 in patients with Crohn's disease in Q3 2026, subject to positive Phase 1 data and regulatory alignment.

Memo Therapeutics AG presented Phase II data for potravitug, a human BK polyomavirus-neutralizing monoclonal antibody, showing 64.1% cumulative probability of ≥1-log10 viral load reduction vs 44.8% in controls (HR 1.60, p=0.05) at week 20 in kidney transplant recipients.

Edesa Biotech reported Phase 3 exploratory data for paridiprubart, an anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody, demonstrating a statistically significant reduction in mortality for patients with acute kidney injury and respiratory distress.

Climb Bio presented initial Phase 1 safety data and translational modeling for CLYM116, a novel 'sweeper' anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody for IgA nephropathy, at the European Renal Association Congress 2026.

Climb Bio presented trial-in-progress data for PrisMN, a Phase 2 study of budoprutug, a low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody, in primary membranous nephropathy at the European Renal Association Congress 2026.
Lupin received FDA approval for Ranluspec (ranibizumab-hkdz), an interchangeable biosimilar to Lucentis, indicated for wet age-related macular degeneration and other retinal diseases.
Ranluspec is a recombinant humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody fragment that inhibits VEGF, approved in 0.3 mg and 0.5 mg strengths for vial and prefilled syringe delivery.

Janssen's guselkumab (Tremfya), a fully human monoclonal antibody targeting IL-23p19, received an FDA label update to include inhibition of structural joint damage progression in adults with active psoriatic arthritis.
Sanofi and Regeneron's dupilumab (Dupixent), a biologic targeting type 2 inflammation, remains a key FDA-approved treatment for prurigo nodularis since 2022.

Lonza — Biologics development services — Accelerated DNA-to-IND programs — Monoclonal antibody programs can achieve IND readiness in as little as six months with toxicology-grade drug substance available in approximately two months.

Shattuck Labs — SL-325 — Crohn's disease and inflammatory immune-mediated diseases — Phase 1 clinical trial enrollment complete; data on safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics expected Q2 2026; Phase 2 initiation planned Q3 2026.

Shattuck Labs — DR3 blocking bispecific antibodies — Inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases — Lead bispecific antibody entered IND-enabling activities to inhibit DR3/TL1A axis and a secondary target.
Climb Bio presented initial Phase 1 safety data for CLYM116, a novel 'sweeper' anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody, at the European Renal Association Congress 2026 for IgA nephropathy treatment.
Climb Bio presented a trial-in-progress poster for PrisMN, a Phase 2 study of budoprutug, a low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody, in primary membranous nephropathy.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — MBP-134 — Ebola virus disease — HHS confirmed US access to this experimental antibody treatment for high-risk exposures; product developed with BARDA funding prior to human clinical trials.
J&J's phase 2 study for nipocalimab, a monoclonal antibody targeting the neonatal Fc receptor (FcRn), showed significant reduction in systemic lupus erythematosus disease activity.
MSD's Enflonsia (clesrovimab-cfor), a monoclonal antibody for RSV prevention, received Singapore HSA approval for infants born during or entering their first RSV season.
Aragen announced a strategic collaboration to manufacture Renaissance Pharma's monoclonal antibody (mAb) program, expanding its biologics manufacturing capabilities.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — MBP-134 — Ebola virus disease — HHS confirmed US access to this experimental antibody treatment for high-risk exposures; product developed with BARDA funding but not yet tested in human clinical trials.

Akeso / Summit Therapeutics — Ivonescimab — Non-small cell lung cancer — Phase 3 data showed 34% reduction in mortality risk vs chemo + PD-1 inhibitor, driving industry focus on PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibodies.
Ona Therapeutics — Undisclosed ADC candidates — Breast and colorectal cancer — Secured $86.6M Series B financing to initiate clinical development of next-generation antibody-drug conjugates.
Lonza — DNA-to-IND Program — Monoclonal Antibodies — Launched GS Ori-Go vector technology to accelerate IND readiness to six months and toxicology-grade drug substance availability to two months.
Shattuck Labs — SL-325 — Crohn's Disease / Ulcerative Colitis — Phase 1 enrollment complete for all six single-ascending dose and three multiple-ascending dose cohorts; topline data expected Q2 2026.
Shattuck Labs — Lead Bispecific DR3 Antibody — Inflammatory and Immune-Mediated Diseases — Entered IND-enabling activities; designed to inhibit DR3/TL1A axis and a secondary target.

Memo Therapeutics — Potravitug — BK polyomavirus infection in kidney transplant recipients — Phase II SAFE KIDNEY II trial: 44.9% viral clearance vs 27.3% controls (HR 1.89, p=0.028) at week 20; propensity score matching confirmed high-quality covariate balance.

Edesa Biotech — Paridiprubart — Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) with respiratory distress — Phase 3 data presented at ERA Congress showed consistent, statistically significant mortality reduction; >400 patients exposed with favorable safety profile.
Climb Bio — CLYM116 — IgA nephropathy — Novel 'sweeper' anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody; Phase 1 safety data and PK/PD modeling from nonhuman primates to healthy volunteers presented at ERA 2026.
Climb Bio — Budoprutug — Primary membranous nephropathy — Low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody; Phase 2 PrisMN trial ongoing with data presented at ERA 2026.

Lupin — Ranluspec (ranibizumab-hkdz) — Wet age-related macular degeneration, diabetic macular edema, and other retinal diseases — FDA approved as interchangeable biosimilar to Lucentis; recombinant humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody fragment inhibiting VEGF.

Janssen — Guselkumab (Tremfya) — Psoriatic Arthritis — FDA label expanded to include structural joint damage inhibition based on APEX trial data showing significantly lower radiographic progression vs placebo at 24 weeks in >1,000 biologic-naïve adults.

Lonza — GS Ori-Go vector technology — Biologics manufacturing — Launched next-generation vector platform for GS Expression System to improve productivity and consistency in early-stage biomanufacturing for monoclonal antibody programs.
Shattuck Labs — SL-325 — Crohn's disease — Phase 1 trial completed enrollment across six single-ascending dose and three multiple-ascending dose cohorts; topline data expected Q2 2026.
Climb Bio — CLYM116 — IgA nephropathy — Novel 'sweeper' anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody; Phase 1 safety data presented at ERA 2026 with PK/PD modeling extrapolated from nonhuman primates to humans.
Climb Bio — Budoprutug — Primary membranous nephropathy — Low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody; Phase 2 PrisMN trial ongoing to evaluate safety and efficacy in B-cell mediated diseases.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — MBP-134 — Ebola virus disease — Experimental antibody treatment authorized for US high-risk exposure cases; efficacy in humans not yet established via clinical trial; dosing inventory held by BARDA.
J&J — Nipocalimab — Systemic Lupus Erythematosus — Phase 2 study demonstrated significant reduction in disease activity; FcRn-targeting monoclonal antibody mechanism confirmed.

MSD — Enflonsia (clesrovimab-cfor) — RSV lower respiratory tract disease in infants — Singapore HSA approval granted for prevention in infants born during or entering first RSV season; monoclonal antibody class.
Aragen — Renaissance Pharma mAb — Undisclosed indication — Secured manufacturing agreement for Renaissance Pharma's monoclonal antibody pipeline as part of ongoing strategic collaboration.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — MBP-134 — Ebola virus disease — Experimental antibody treatment authorized for US patients with high-risk exposures; dosing inventory held by BARDA and undisclosed to the public.
Summit Therapeutics — Commercialization of PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody — Ivonescimab — Phase 3 data supports lung cancer indication; industry benchmark for bispecific antibody efficacy.

Ona Therapeutics — Differentiated antibody-drug conjugate development — Breast and colorectal cancer ADCs — $86.6M Series B raised to advance clinical pipeline; positioned to compete with approved ADCs like Enhertu.
Lonza — Accelerated biologics development services — Monoclonal antibody programs — Deployed GS Ori-Go vector platform to support over 100 commercial products and reduce early-stage development risk.

Shattuck Labs — First-in-class DR3 blocking antibody commercialization — SL-325 (monoclonal) + Bispecific pipeline — Phase 1 enrollment complete; Phase 2 in Crohn's disease targeted for Q3 2026 initiation.

Memo Therapeutics AG — Late-stage biotech targeting viral infections and cancer — Potravitug (BKPyV-neutralizing mAb) — Phase II data presented at 63rd European Renal Association Congress; no approved treatments currently exist for BKPyV infection.

Edesa Biotech — Host-directed therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory diseases — Paridiprubart (anti-TLR4 mAb) — Phase 3 data supports mortality reduction in AKI; mechanism agnostic to causal agent with potential utility in ARDS, sepsis, and biodefense.
Climb Bio — Development of immune-mediated disease therapeutics — CLYM116 (anti-APRIL mAb) and Budoprutug (anti-CD19 mAb) — Clinical-stage; presenting Phase 1 and Phase 2 data at ERA 2026.
Lupin — Biosimilar portfolio expansion — Ranluspec (ranibizumab-hkdz) — Second US biosimilar approved; targets complex biologics market with interchangeable status for Lucentis indications.

Janssen — Label expansion for structural damage inhibition — Guselkumab (Tremfya) — Fully human monoclonal antibody against IL-23p19; APEX trial data supports immediate clinical impact for early or late-stage psoriatic arthritis.

Sanofi / Regeneron — Chronic inflammatory skin disease management — Dupilumab (Dupixent) — Biologic targeting IL-4/IL-13; approved for prurigo nodularis in 2022, representing a paradigm shift in limited therapeutic options.

Lonza — Accelerated DNA-to-IND services for monoclonal antibodies — GS Ori-Go vector platform — Enhanced preclinical offering reduces IND timeline to six months while integrating development, manufacturing, and regulatory insights.

Shattuck Labs — First-in-class DR3 blocking monoclonal and bispecific antibody development — SL-325 and lead bispecific candidate — Phase 1 enrollment complete for SL-325; lead bispecific entered IND-enabling activities.

Climb Bio — Development of immune-mediated disease therapeutics — CLYM116 (anti-APRIL mAb) + Budoprutug (anti-CD19 mAb) — Clinical-stage pipeline advancing with Phase 1 and Phase 2 data presentations at ERA 2026.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — Emergency Ebola response — MBP-134 (antibody treatment) — Product authorized by HHS for US high-risk exposures; manufacturing and inventory funded by BARDA; human efficacy data pending.
J&J — Advancing FcRn-targeting monoclonal antibody pipeline — Nipocalimab — Phase 2 data positive for systemic lupus erythematosus; regulatory submissions anticipated.
MSD — Commercializing RSV monoclonal antibody — Enflonsia (clesrovimab-cfor) — Singapore HSA approval secured; positioned for infant RSV prevention market entry.
Aragen — Biologics manufacturing expansion — Renaissance Pharma mAb program — Executed strategic collaboration to manufacture monoclonal antibodies for partner.
Renaissance Pharma — Monoclonal antibody commercialization — mAb pipeline — Partnered with Aragen for manufacturing of its monoclonal antibody assets.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals — Emergency Ebola response — MBP-134 (antibody treatment) — Product authorized for US high-risk exposure cases; manufacturing and inventory controlled by BARDA; efficacy in humans not yet established via clinical trial.
Ivonescimab — Mechanism: PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody — Phase: 3 — Population: Non-small cell lung cancer — Comparator: Chemotherapy + PD-1 inhibitor — Results: 34% reduction in risk of death.

Ona Therapeutics ADC candidates — Mechanism: Antibody-drug conjugate (protein linked to toxic payload) — Phase: Pre-clinical/early clinical — Population: Advanced breast and colorectal cancer — Status: $86.6M funding secured for clinical entry.

SL-325 — Mechanism: DR3 blocking monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers — Endpoints: Safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, receptor occupancy, duration of receptor occupancy, pharmacodynamics, and immunogenicity — Status: Enrollment complete, data analysis ongoing.

Lonza GS Ori-Go — Mechanism: Next-generation vector platform for GS Expression System — Application: Monoclonal antibody biomanufacturing — Outcome: Improved productivity and consistency enabling six-month IND readiness.

Potravitug — Mechanism: Human BK polyomavirus-neutralizing monoclonal antibody — Phase: 2 (SAFE KIDNEY II) — Population: Kidney transplant recipients with BKPyV infection — Comparator: Placebo/external control — Results: 64.1% achieved ≥1-log10 viral reduction (HR 1.60, p=0.05); 44.9% viral clearance (HR 1.89, p=0.028) at week 20.

Paridiprubart — Mechanism: Anti-TLR4 (Toll-like Receptor 4) monoclonal antibody dampening hyperinflammatory cascade — Phase: 3 — Population: Patients with acute kidney injury and respiratory distress — Comparator: Not specified in abstract — Results: Statistically significant reduction in mortality; >400 patients exposed with favorable safety profile.

CLYM116 — Mechanism: Anti-APRIL 'sweeper' monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers — Endpoints/Results: Initial safety data presented; PK/PD extrapolation from nonhuman primates to humans confirmed.

Budoprutug — Mechanism: Low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody with enhanced effector function — Phase: 2 (PrisMN) — Population: Primary membranous nephropathy — Endpoints/Results: Trial in progress; targets CD19-expressing B cells including plasmablasts and plasma cells.

Ranluspec — Mechanism: Recombinant humanized IgG1 monoclonal antibody fragment inhibiting VEGF — Phase: Approved (Biosimilar) — Population: Patients with wet AMD, diabetic macular edema, retinal vein occlusion, diabetic retinopathy, myopic CNV — Comparator: Lucentis (reference product) — Status: Interchangeable biosimilar approved in 0.3 mg and 0.5 mg strengths.

Guselkumab — Mechanism: Fully human monoclonal antibody binding CD64 and inhibiting IL-23p19 subunit — Phase: 3 (APEX trial) — Population: >1,000 biologic-naïve adults with active psoriatic arthritis — Comparator: Placebo — Results: Significantly lower rates of radiographic progression at 24 weeks.

SL-325 — Mechanism: DR3 blocking antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers — Comparator: None stated — Endpoints: Safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, receptor occupancy, duration of receptor occupancy, pharmacodynamics, and immunogenicity; data expected Q2 2026.

Shattuck lead bispecific antibody — Mechanism: Dual inhibition of DR3/TL1A axis and secondary target — Phase: IND-enabling — Population: Inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases — Comparator: None stated — Status: Entered IND-enabling activities.

CLYM116 — Mechanism: Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody with 'sweeper' properties — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers — Endpoints: Initial safety data and PK/PD modeling from NHPs to humans presented.

Budoprutug — Mechanism: Low-fucosylated anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody targeting CD19-expressing B cells, plasmablasts, and plasma cells — Phase: 2 (PrisMN) — Population: Primary membranous nephropathy — Endpoints: Safety and efficacy evaluation for durable B-cell depletion and autoantibody reduction.

MBP-134 — Mechanism: Antibody treatment (monoclonal class implied by context of 'antibody treatment' and BARDA portfolio) — Phase: Pre-clinical/Investigational — Population: Humans with high-risk Ebola exposure — Comparator: None stated — Results: Promising animal testing data; human efficacy not yet confirmed.

Nipocalimab — Mechanism: FcRn blockade to reduce pathogenic IgG — Phase: 2 — Population: Systemic lupus erythematosus patients — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints/Results: Significant reduction in disease activity reported.

Enflonsia (clesrovimab-cfor) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody neutralizing RSV — Phase: Post-approval — Population: Infants born during or entering first RSV season — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints/Results: Singapore HSA approval for prevention of lower respiratory tract disease.

MBP-134 — Mechanism: Antibody-based neutralization (specific MOA not detailed in source) — Phase: Pre-clinical/Investigational — Population: Humans with high-risk Ebola exposure (authorized for emergency use) — Comparator: None stated — Results: Promising efficacy demonstrated in animal testing; human clinical trial data not yet available.
Ona Therapeutics — Series B financing — ADC pipeline — Raised $86.6M to fund clinical development of differentiated antibody-drug conjugates for breast and colorectal cancers.
Akeso / Summit Therapeutics — Licensing deal — Ivonescimab — Partnership drives global commercialization of PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody following positive Phase 3 lung cancer data.

Lonza — Strategic service expansion — Monoclonal antibody development — Integrated DNA-to-IND offering launched to de-risk early-stage decisions and accelerate timelines for pharma and biotech customers.
Lupin — Commercial launch of Ranluspec — Ranibizumab biosimilar — FDA approval secures market entry for second US biosimilar in portfolio, expanding access to proven vision therapies.

Lonza — Strategic service expansion — Monoclonal antibody development — Launched enhanced DNA-to-IND program leveraging GS Ori-Go technology to de-risk and accelerate timelines for early-stage pharma and biotech clients.
Mapp Biopharmaceuticals / BARDA — MBP-134 development and supply — BARDA funded development and holds inventory of MBP-134 antibody treatment; specific deal value undisclosed.
Aragen / Renaissance Pharma — Strategic manufacturing collaboration — Monoclonal antibody (mAb) production — Agreement established for Aragen to manufacture Renaissance Pharma's mAb assets.

Mapp Biopharmaceuticals / BARDA — Emergency access authorization — MBP-134 — BARDA retains ownership of all doses; HHS confirmed distribution protocol for US citizens with high-risk Ebola exposure in Central Africa.
